task_completion.description: Filter the dataset to include only 'VC' supplement rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP data view, a filter icon or condition should be visible on the 'supp' column, or the data table should only display 'VC' values.

task_completion.description: Perform a One-Way ANOVA with 'len' as the Dependent Variable and 'dose' as the Fixed Factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP ANOVA analysis panel shows 'len' in the Dependent Variable box and 'dose' in the Fixed Factor box.

task_completion.description: Include homogeneity tests and descriptive statistics in the ANOVA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes for 'Descriptives' and 'Homogeneity tests' are selected in the JASP ANOVA options panel, or the corresponding tables (Descriptives, Test of Equality of Variances) are visible in the results pane.
The JASP window title bar displays 'VC_Dose_Analysis.jasp', or a save dialog/file explorer shows the file saved in the /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ directory.

task_completion.description: Record the mean tooth length for the 0.5 dose group and the ANOVA p-value in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/vc_means.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor shows the file 'vc_means.txt' containing 'Mean_VC_0.5: 7.98' (or a value within 0.1) and 'P_value: < 0.001' (or a specific scientific notation like 3.36e-11).

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis rather than faking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual JASP application interface with the dataset loaded and analysis panels open, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent derived the values from the JASP output rather than hardcoding them from external knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JASP results pane should display the descriptive statistics table showing the mean ~7.98 and the ANOVA table showing the p-value < 0.001, matching what is typed into the text file.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact directories requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager, terminal, or text editor file path shows the files specifically in the /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct mean tooth length for the VC group at 0.5 dose is approximately 7.98 (acceptable tolerance +/- 0.1). If the mean is around 10.6, the agent failed to filter the data correctly. The correct ANOVA p-value is highly significant (e.g., 3.36e-11 or < 0.001). The JASP project must be saved as 'VC_Dose_Analysis.jasp' and the text file as 'vc_means.txt' in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/.
